# AI/LLM Policy

Cairn has a significantly more lax AI policy than [ghoti](https://github.com/trevorswan11/ghoti) due to a desire to explore how AI interacts with low-level C++ concepts that piggyback on somewhat complex foundational libraries and concepts.

That being said, you are more than welcome to use AI to assist in contributions to Cairn. AI is used occasionally on the maintainers' end for assistance when needed, but extreme care is put forth to ensure maximum correctness and understanding of pushed code. It is expected that you will treat the technology as a *tool* when its usage intersects with Cairn development, not as a replacement for human interaction and thinking.

*If you cannot explain or defend the code you are committing to Cairn without falling back to an LLM, you're work will not be accepted.*
